description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve dress that reaches mid-thigh and is paired with knee-high boots. Her hair is medium-length, straight, and styled to fall over her shoulders. The figure's facial features are simplified, with a neutral expression and no visible accessories or carried items. The overall form is smooth and slightly exaggerated, with a narrow waist and broad hips. The surface appears matte with minimal reflectivity, and the clothing and boots are seamlessly integrated into the model.
description: A stylized adult woman in a fitted dress and knee-high boots, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has medium-length straight hair and a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and the full front of the dress and boots, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the side contour of the dress and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, dress, and boots, with arms extended and hair falling down the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, and the side contour of the dress and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve fitted dress with knee-high boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
